name: @gitgecko/mcp-gateway
description: The canonical home of the mcp-gateway owner (src/tool.ts exports mcpGatewayOwner — the OwnerSpec the socket Registry consumes). Defines the McpTool shape, the ToolRegistry interface, and the tool-exposer contribution type. This is the owner LIBRARY; a deployable HTTP server and the plug that bridges code-intel/rules/review capabilities into McpTool contributions live alongside (see plugs/mcp-gateway/exposers). The inverse of CodeRabbit's MCP-client posture (CR-§3) and Greptile's closed/hosted MCP (GP-§3): any agent can consume gitgecko's engine.
